name: CattleGuard
short: Role management: default role assignment and inactivity-based role transitions.
description: Automatically assigns a default role to members with no roles, and moves members between roles based on configurable inactivity thresholds. Supports multiple inactivity rules and a scheduled background check.
install_msg: Thanks for installing CattleGuard! Get started with `[p]cg settings` and `[p]help cattleguard`.
author: nerdbarbie
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store any end user data. Role changes are performed in real-time.
